'''chozagaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:xiphopubic|xiphopubic]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ch-z-g
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:xiphopubic|xiphopubic]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| chozagaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:chozagithi|chozagithi]] || [[word:chozagiji|chozagiji]] || [[word:chozagishi|chozagishi]] || [[word:chozagiki|chozagiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:chozaguthuthu|chozaguthuthu]] || [[word:chozagujuju|chozagujuju]] || [[word:chozagushushu|chozagushushu]] || [[word:chozagukuku|chozagukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:chozaguthu|chozaguthu]] || [[word:chozaguju|chozaguju]] || [[word:chozagushu|chozagushu]] || [[word:chozaguku|chozaguku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:chozagufthuf|chozagufthuf]] || [[word:chozagufjuf|chozagufjuf]] || [[word:chozagufshuf|chozagufshuf]] || [[word:chozagufkuf|chozagufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:chozagethe|chozagethe]] || [[word:chozageje|chozageje]] || [[word:chozageshe|chozageshe]] || [[word:chozageke|chozageke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:chozagothotho|chozagothotho]] || [[word:chozagojojo|chozagojojo]] || [[word:chozagoshosho|chozagoshosho]] || [[word:chozagokoko|chozagokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:chozagotho|chozagotho]] || [[word:chozagojo|chozagojo]] || [[word:chozagosho|chozagosho]] || [[word:chozagoko|chozagoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:chozagofthof|chozagofthof]] || [[word:chozagofjof|chozagofjof]] || [[word:chozagofshof|chozagofshof]] || [[word:chozagofkof|chozagofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:chozagïfthïf|chozagïfthïf]] || [[word:chozagïfjïf|chozagïfjïf]] || [[word:chozagïfshïf|chozagïfshïf]] || [[word:chozagïfkïf|chozagïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:chozagïfthïfthïf|chozagïfthïfthïf]] || [[word:chozagïfjïfjïf|chozagïfjïfjïf]] || [[word:chozagïfshïfshïf|chozagïfshïfshïf]] || [[word:chozagïfkïfkïf|chozagïfkïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:chozagïfthïf|chozagïfthïf]] || [[word:chozagïfjïf|chozagïfjïf]] || [[word:chozagïfshïf|chozagïfshïf]] || [[word:chozagïfkïf|chozagïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:chozagïfthïf|chozagïfthïf]] || [[word:chozagïfjïf|chozagïfjïf]] || [[word:chozagïfshïf|chozagïfshïf]] || [[word:chozagïfkïf|chozagïfkïf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:chozagæthæ|chozagæthæ]] || [[word:chozagæjæ|chozagæjæ]] || [[word:chozagæshæ|chozagæshæ]] || [[word:chozagækæ|chozagækæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:chozagathatha|chozagathatha]] || [[word:chozagajaja|chozagajaja]] || [[word:chozagashasha|chozagashasha]] || [[word:chozagakaka|chozagakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:chozagatha|chozagatha]] || [[word:chozagaja|chozagaja]] || [[word:chozagasha|chozagasha]] || [[word:chozagaka|chozagaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:chozagafthaf|chozagafthaf]] || [[word:chozagafjaf|chozagafjaf]] || [[word:chozagafshaf|chozagafshaf]] || [[word:chozagafkaf|chozagafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:chozagasha|chozagasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:chozagshësha|chozagshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:chozagrosha|chozagrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:chozagmusha|chozagmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:chozagyasha|chozagyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gochozagnkshësha|gochozagnkshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gochozagnkrosha|gochozagnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gochozagnkmusha|gochozagnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gochozagnkyasha|gochozagnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:chozazagasha|chozazagasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:chozazagshësha|chozazagshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:chozazagrosha|chozazagrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:chozazagmusha|chozazagmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:chozazagyasha|chozazagyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gochozazagnkshësha|gochozazagnkshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gochozazagnkrosha|gochozazagnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gochozazagnkmusha|gochozazagnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gochozazagnkyasha|gochozazagnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:chezægasha|chezægasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:chezægshësha|chezægshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:chezægrosha|chezægrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:chezægmusha|chezægmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:chezægyasha|chezægyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gochezægnkshësha|gochezægnkshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gochezægnkrosha|gochezægnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gochezægnkmusha|gochezægnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gochezægnkyasha|gochezægnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:chozfagasha|chozfagasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:chozfagshësha|chozfagshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:chozfagrosha|chozfagrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:chozfagmusha|chozfagmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:chozfagyasha|chozfagyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gochozfagnkshësha|gochozfagnkshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gochozfagnkrosha|gochozfagnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gochozfagnkmusha|gochozfagnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gochozfagnkyasha|gochozfagnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|dea8a94}}
